subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord, my Hope, my Aspiration, and my Desire! The hearts have been rent asunder, the pillars have trembled, and souls have melted away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و ربی و رجائی و املی و منائی قد تقطعت الاکباد و ارتعدت الارکان و ذابت القلوب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @prayer for the departed, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
